item.name: Chocobo Whistle
item.description: A small hand-carved whistle that emits a unique, high-pitched tone discernible only by a chocobo trained from birth to recognize and respond to the sound. Use to summon your personal chocobo.

mount.name: Company Chocobo
mount.action: Summon your Grand Company-issued battle chocobo.
mount.description: Born and bred in the city–state of Ishgard, the majority of company chocobos are geldings of the rouncey variety; however, massive destriers and miniature Belah'dian jennets are also raised to accommodate the builds of Roegadyn and Lalafellin riders respectively.
mount.tooltip:
Chocobos are stout-
hearted creatures, but
they have their limits.
- Mimigun
